series_metadata.series_description: The Educational Improvement Records are completed by the BWC employees looking to enhance their training or education. The Educational Improvement Records include the Employee Training Records, Workforce Development forms, Tuition Reimbursement forms, Education Assistance forms, College Voucher forms, class sign-in sheets, rosters, student transcripts, pre-tests, post tests, and evaluations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 2 years, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
